patches.summary: Added cross-cultural-consensus preemption sentence after spherical-earth preemptive in argument (2). Closes c7 H3 carry-forward.

Appended corrected-denominator clause to scorecard-carve-out sentence. Now names that dropping WIN-031/032/034 leaves ~94.3%≈current 94.5%, framing this as a definition-of-confirmation objection not a scorecard-padding objection. Closes c7 H4 carry-forward.

Extended trilemma preemptive to cover vault-isolation/instrumental-coupling-mode partition (two-data-point curve fit, no third-site prediction). Fully neutralizes c3 advocate-mode escape that ISS-1528 only partially closed.

Softened TLDR from 'detecting a gravity signal (WIN-011)' to 'alleged gravity signal (WIN-011 — disputed)'. Removes cross-panel inconsistency where TLDR read in isolation contradicted WIN-011 verdict (Not Demonstrated).
